tool_args.label: Woodhaven / Cross Bay Boulevard (Q52/53) CAC Meeting #6

payload.project_name: Woodhaven / Cross Bay Boulevard (Q52/53) Select Bus Service
payload.description: Transform Woodhaven and Cross Bay Boulevards into a complete street with dedicated bus lanes, median bus stops, transit signal priority, off-board fare collection, and pedestrian safety improvements. Phased as a 2017 implementation project followed by a capital project.

payload.street: Woodhaven Boulevard and Cross Bay Boulevard
payload.description: Important north/south transit corridor for Queens based on the existing Q52/53 LTD bus route. Provides connections to 8 subway lines, over 20 bus routes, and the LIRR.
Select Bus Service on Woodhaven / Cross Bay corridor, based on existing Q52 LTD route
Select Bus Service on Woodhaven / Cross Bay corridor, based on existing Q53 LTD route
Lead agency for Woodhaven/Cross Bay SBS short-term implementation project
Will implement SBS for 2017 launch on Q52/53

payload.description: Will implement capital project after 2017

Q52/53 SBS launch with improved fare payment and branded service
Three community open houses scheduled for May 17 (Rockaways), May 21 (Ozone Park), and May 25 (Woodhaven)
Bus lanes installed on Woodhaven Blvd between Dry Harbor Rd and Metropolitan Ave
Dedicated bus lanes along the corridor including main road bus lanes where service roads exist, offset/curbside bus lanes, and bus-only roadways

payload.claim_text: Select Bus Service (SBS) is New York City's brand name for Bus Rapid Transit: an improved bus service that offers fast, frequent, and reliable service on high-ridership bus routes.
SBS has brought: 15-23% faster bus speeds, about 10% increase in ridership, more reliable service, customer satisfaction of 95%, safer streets / reduction in crashes.

Key design updates addressing community concerns: pedestrian refuge islands, curb extensions and mid-block crossings for safety; taller unique fencing for median station safety; longer left-turn bays for congestion; restored left turns; maintained parking on Woodhaven Blvd between Park Lane S & Forest Park Dr; phased project as 2017 implementation and later capital project.

payload.scope: Woodhaven / Cross Bay SBS corridor
Woodhaven / Cross Bay SBS corridor, Woodside to the Rockaways
